title: begonia quadrialata subsp. quadrialata
intro: Begonia quadrialata subsp. quadrialata, also known as Begonia quadrialata or "four-angled begonia," is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Begonia quadrialata subsp. quadrialata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Begonia quadrialata subsp. quadrialata typically involve boiling the leaves or stems to create a tea or infusing them in oil to create a topical treatment.
